zh.lifeSummary: Guillaume d'Aubigny, seigneur de Saint-Martin-d'Aubigny於大約1010年出生在法國諾門迪曼其沙吉馬-達奧比尼。他和Adeliza du Plessis至少有7個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1066年在法國皮卡迪索姆享年57歲，埋葬在英國萊希斯特斯爾貝爾沃易 卡素。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Guillaume d'Aubigny, seigneur de Saint-Martin-d'Aubigny于大约1010年出生在法国諾門迪曼其沙吉馬-達奧比尼。他和Adeliza du Plessis至少有7个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1066年在法国皮卡迪索姆享年57岁，埋葬在英国萊希斯特斯爾貝爾沃易 卡素。

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: Sweyn Forkbeard
historicEvents.description: The Danes raided and captured England. Sweyn, King of Danes, was declared King of England on Christmas Day.

historicEvents.title: Canut the Great
historicEvents.description: As Aethelred, King of England died, his son, Edmund Ironside devised a truce with Danish King Canute. The truce divided the kingdom between the two but Edmund died shortly after and became King of England. Several years later, he also became king of Denmark.

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

en.lifeSummary: Guillaume d'Aubigny, seigneur de Saint-Martin-d'Aubigny was born about 1010, in Saint-Martin-d'Aubigny, Manche, Normandy, France. He had at least 7 sons and 2 daughters with Adeliza du Plessis. He died in 1066, in Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 57, and was buried in Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Guillaume d'Aubigny, seigneur de Saint-Martin-d'Aubigny est né environ 1010, à Saint-Martin-d'Aubigny, Manche, Normandie, France. Il a eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles avec Adeliza du Plessis. Il est décédé en 1066, à Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Guillaume d'Aubigny, seigneur de Saint-Martin-d'Aubigny wurde um 1010 in Saint-Martin-d'Aubigny, Manche, Normandie, Frankreich geboren. Er hatte mit Adeliza du Plessis mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1066 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Somme, Picardie, Frankreich und wurde in Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Guillaume d'Aubigny, seigneur de Saint-Martin-d'Aubigny è nato il circa 1010 nel Saint-Martin-d'Aubigny, Manche, Normandie, Francia. Lui avuto almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie con Adeliza du Plessis. Morì nel 1066, nel Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume d'Aubigny, seigneur de Saint-Martin-d'Aubignyは約1010年にフランスノーマンディマンチェサイント-マルティン-ド'アウビグニーで生まれた。彼はAdeliza du Plessisとの間に少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1066年にフランスピカーディソンメで57歳で死去し，イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアベルボイル カストルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume d'Aubigny, seigneur de Saint-Martin-d'Aubigny(은)는 대략 1010년 프랑스 노먼디 먼체 세인트-마틴-드'오비그니에서 태어났다. 그는 Adeliza du Plessis(와)과 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1066년 프랑스 피카디 솜에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 레이스스터실르 벨보이르 카스틀에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Guillaume d'Aubigny, seigneur de Saint-Martin-d'Aubigny nasceu aproximadamente 1010, em Saint-Martin-d'Aubigny, Manche, Normandie, França. Ele teve pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas com Adeliza du Plessis. Ele faleceu em 1066, em Somme, Picardie, França, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Guillaume d'Aubigny, seigneur de Saint-Martin-d'Aubigny родился около 1010 г. в местности сеинт-мартин-д'аубигни, манч, норманди, Франция. У него было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери от Adeliza du Plessis. Он умер в 1066 г. в местности сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности белвоир кастл, лисестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Guillaume d'Aubigny, seigneur de Saint-Martin-d'Aubigny nació aproximadamente 1010, en Saint-Martin-d'Aubigny, Manche, Normandie, Francia. Tuvo por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas con Adeliza du Plessis. Murió en 1066, en Somme, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.
